title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, India Ratings Ventures Solutions in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About India Ratings Ventures Solutions:
India Ratings Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings Ventures Solutions!
